mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attach_file ( original_name, stored_path, content_type, file_size, menu_url, member_seq, create_id, create_ip, create_dt, use_yn ) VALUES ( #{originalName}, #{storedPath}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{menuUrl}, #{memberSeq}, #{createId}, #{createIp}, NOW(), 'Y' )
mapper.select: SELECT file_seq AS fileSeq, original_name AS originalName, stored_path AS storedPath, content_type AS contentType, file_size AS fileSize, menu_url AS menuUrl, member_seq AS memberSeq, create_id AS createId, create_ip AS createIp, DATE_FORMAT(create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt, use_yn AS useYn FROM attach_file WHERE file_seq = #{fileSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
